name: Medical Imaging Read
description: Structured medical-image reading. Router identifies modality + body region; then the appropriate specialist reader produces a systematic finding report; the summarizer formats it for clinical handoff. Best-fit for chest CT (the most common case). For other modalities (head CT, X-ray, dermatology, pathology) you can delegate directly to the specialist sub-agent from chat — they're all installed by this pack. Decision support only — every output recommends professional review.

inputs.label: Medical image / study (drag DICOM zip, paste screenshot, or describe the imaging)
Clinical context (symptoms, prior dx, what you're looking for) — optional
